name: add-method
description: ADD (AI-Driven Development) — the methodology skill, installable straight into Claude Code.

plugins.name: add
plugins.description: Drives every feature through Specify → Scenarios → Contract → Tests → Build → Verify → Observe, with red/green TDD built in. On first run it materializes the engine and the AIDD book into your project — self-contained and portable, exactly like an npm or pip install, no extra tooling needed.
